TEST CASE: main_branch
DESC: Main branch -> latest + main-sha
ENV: {'BRANCH_NAME': 'main', 'COMMIT_SHA': 'abc1234def5678', 'PR_NUMBER': '', 'GIT_TAGS': ''}
EXPECTED: ['latest', 'main-abc1234']
EXIT CODE: 0
============================================================
[Docker Image Tag Generator/Generate Docker Image Tags] ⭐ Run Set up job
[Docker Image Tag Generator/Generate Docker Image Tags] 🚀  Start image=act-ubuntu-pwsh:latest
[Docker Image Tag Generator/Generate Docker Image Tags]   🐳  docker pull image=act-ubuntu-pwsh:latest platform= username= forcePull=false
[Docker Image Tag Generator/Generate Docker Image Tags]   🐳  docker create image=act-ubuntu-pwsh:latest platform= entrypoint=["tail" "-f" "/dev/null"] cmd=[] network="host"
[Docker Image Tag Generator/Generate Docker Image Tags]   🐳  docker run image=act-ubuntu-pwsh:latest platform= entrypoint=["tail" "-f" "/dev/null"] cmd=[] network="host"
[Docker Image Tag Generator/Generate Docker Image Tags]   🐳  docker exec cmd=[node --no-warnings -e console.log(process.execPath)] user= workdir=
